task: Advanced high-value task: Quasi-Identifier Release Cell Test Harness Acceptance Pack. Scenario: a validation lead needs a compact but complete evidence trail for an expert signoff meeting for quasi-identifier release cell. Embedded packet: Records: R1 cell_count=46 epsilon_requested=77 sensitive_field_count=7; R2 cell_count=55 epsilon_requested=73 sensitive_field_count=10; R3 cell_count=41 epsilon_requested=88 sensitive_field_count=6. Remediation options: O1 changes cell_count by -12% cost=78500; O2 changes epsilon_requested by -18% cost=96100; O3 changes sensitive_field_count by -25% cost=55900; max_budget=121200. Rules and constraints: cell_count<5 suppress; epsilon>1 requires privacy review; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: build a row-level evidence table, then write the decision logic that separates pass, warning, failure, and needs_review cases. Deliver privacy_release_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
